models.description: FastDVDnet temporal pre-filter (5-frame luma window) — upstream m-tassano/fastdvdnet weights wrapped for the fork's luma-only NCHW contract.
models.notes: Real FastDVDnet upstream weights (Tassano, Delon, Veit 2020; MIT). Upstream pinned at github.com/m-tassano/fastdvdnet@c8fdf61; luma adapter (Y->[Y,Y,Y] tile, sigma=25/255 noise map, RGB->Y BT.601 collapse) preserves the libvmaf 5-frame luma I/O contract from ADR-0215. Exported via ai/scripts/export_fastdvdnet_pre.py. T6-7b. See docs/ai/models/fastdvdnet_pre.md and docs/adr/0215-fastdvdnet-pre-filter.md.

Tiny FR regressor (C1) — 6-feature canonical-6 vector (adm2, vif_scale0..3, motion2) → VMAF teacher score scalar. Trained on the Netflix Public Dataset (9 ref + 70 dis YUVs) with vmaf_v0.6.1 as DMOS-aligned teacher. 9-fold LOSO mean PLCC = 0.9977 ± 0.0025. Shipped checkpoint trained on all 9 sources. Exported via ai/scripts/train_fr_regressor.py. See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v1.md + ADR-0249.

Tiny FR regressor v2 (codec-aware) — 6 canonical libvmaf features (adm2, vif_scale0..3, motion2) + 8-D codec block (6 encoder one-hot + preset_norm + crf_norm) -> VMAF teacher score. Trained on the vmaf-tune Phase A JSONL corpus (ADR-0237). Production checkpoint. In-sample PLCC=0.9794. Exported via ai/scripts/train_fr_regressor_v2.py. See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2.md + ADR-0272 + ADR-0235.
Ensemble member of fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1 (seed=0). See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2_probabilistic.md and fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1.json manifest.
Ensemble member of fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1 (seed=1). See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2_probabilistic.md and fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1.json manifest.
Ensemble member of fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1 (seed=2). See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2_probabilistic.md and fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1.json manifest.
Ensemble member of fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1 (seed=3). See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2_probabilistic.md and fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1.json manifest.
Ensemble member of fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1 (seed=4). See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v2_probabilistic.md and fr_regressor_v2_ensemble_v1.json manifest.

models.description: Tiny residual filter for vmaf_pre — degraded → clean luma.
models.notes: Tiny residual filter baseline for vmaf_pre — self-supervised on KoNViD-1k frames with synthetic blur+JPEG degradation. ~19K params; opset 17. See docs/adr/0168-tinyai-konvid-baselines.md.
LPIPS-SqueezeNet (richzhang/PerceptualSimilarity v0.1). Two-input model: 'ref' + 'dist' ImageNet-normalised NCHW; scalar 'score' output. Exported via ai/lpips_export.py.

Superseded by saliency_student_v1 (ADR-0286) for production use; retained as the historical smoke-only placeholder ADR-0218 / ADR-0257 referenced. Synthetic Conv+Sigmoid matching the MobileSal I/O contract; emits per-pixel saliency in [0,1]. Real-weights swap from upstream MobileSal was deferred per ADR-0257 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 + Google-Drive-walled + RGB-D); the fork-trained saliency_student_v1 replaces it. See docs/ai/models/saliency_student_v1.md.

models.description: Tiny no-reference quality metric — single-frame 224×224 grayscale.
models.notes: Tiny NR MobileNet baseline trained on KoNViD-1k (CC BY 4.0; not redistributed). 224×224 grayscale input; ~19K params; opset 17. Dynamic-PTQ int8 sidecar produced via ai/scripts/ptq_dynamic.py (T5-3d). See docs/adr/0168-tinyai-konvid-baselines.md and docs/adr/0174-per-model-ptq.md.

models.description: Fork-trained tiny U-Net saliency student trained on DUTS-TR — production weights for the mobilesal extractor.
models.notes: Fork-trained tiny U-Net (~113K params) trained from scratch on DUTS-TR (Wang et al. 2017). Drop-in for mobilesal_placeholder_v0; same input/saliency_map names + NCHW shapes. ConvTranspose stride-2 upsample (every op on the allowlist). 50ep Adam lr=1e-3 BCE+Dice bs=32 crop=256 seed=42; best val IoU=0.6558; PT<->ORT max-abs-diff=1.49e-6. DUTS images not redistributed; weights are. See docs/ai/models/saliency_student_v1.md and docs/adr/0270.

models.description: fp16 I/O round-trip CI probe (Identity op).
models.notes: fp16 I/O round-trip probe (Identity op). Exercises the fp16_io cast path; not a quality model.
CI load-path probe (Conv + Identity). Not a quality model.

models.description: TransNet V2 shot-boundary detector (Soucek & Lokoc 2020) — 100-frame window of 27x48 RGB thumbnails -> per-frame logits.
models.notes: TransNet V2 shot-boundary detector (T6-3a-followup). 100-frame window of 27x48 RGB thumbnails -> per-frame shot-boundary logits. Real upstream weights from Soucek & Lokoc 2020 (MIT). Wrapper transposes NTCHW->NTHWC; ColorHistograms ScatterND-rewritten for opset-17. See docs/ai/models/transnet_v2.md.

models.description: Tiny VMAF fusion regressor — canonical-6 features + bundled StandardScaler + mlp_small (~257 params).
models.notes: vmaf_tiny_v2 — Phase-3 validated mlp_small (6→16→8→1) over canonical-6 (adm2, vif_scale0..3, motion2). 90ep Adam lr=1e-3 MSE bs=256. StandardScaler baked into ONNX graph (ADR-0244). Trained 4-corpus parquet (NF+KV+BVI-DVC A+B+C+D, 330499 rows). PLCC 0.9978±0.0021 NF LOSO; 0.9998 KV 5-fold; 0.9999 ship-gate. See docs/ai/models/vmaf_tiny_v2.md.

models.description: Tiny VMAF fusion regressor — canonical-6 features + bundled StandardScaler + mlp_medium (~769 params).
models.notes: vmaf_tiny_v3 — mlp_medium (6→32→16→1) ~3x v2 capacity over canonical-6. 90ep Adam lr=1e-3 MSE bs=256. StandardScaler baked into ONNX graph. Trained 4-corpus parquet. NF LOSO PLCC 0.9986±0.0015. Dynamic-PTQ int8 sidecar via ai/scripts/ptq_dynamic.py (ADR-0275). See docs/ai/models/vmaf_tiny_v3.md.

models.description: Tiny VMAF fusion regressor — canonical-6 features + bundled StandardScaler + mlp_large (~3073 params).
models.notes: vmaf_tiny_v4 — mlp_large (6→64→32→16→1) ~12x v2 / ~4x v3 capacity over canonical-6. 90ep Adam lr=1e-3 MSE bs=256. StandardScaler baked into ONNX graph. Trained 4-corpus parquet. NF LOSO PLCC 0.9987±0.0015. Dynamic-PTQ int8 sidecar via ai/scripts/ptq_dynamic.py (ADR-0275). See docs/ai/models/vmaf_tiny_v4.md.
